Stay-the-night/[-Info-].title: [ Info ]
Stay-the-night/[-Info-].content:
Your first date invites you over into their house for a quick drink, but it ends up with the two of you watching a movie while under the blankets. Tired from the day, you end up falling asleep in your date’s arms, only waking up when the movie ends. You end up in a panic after realizing that it’s the middle of the night and that you have to go home, but your date convinces you to stay the night since it’d be too dangerous to go home at such an hour, especially with such cold weather. Still tired, you end up falling back into your date’s arms… Caught up in the moment, you turn around and give your date a kiss on the lips, a kiss that eventually escalates into your date carrying you into their room and giving you a rough pounding.

“Sleep very well my love…”
